_README: Grid calibration + display defaults per map, keyed by the encounter's map_ref. NUMBERS ARE NATIVE (full-resolution) — combat.html computes scale = renderedWidth / (cols*cellPx), so the SAME entry works whether a desktop loads full-res or a phone loads a downscaled Cloudinary copy. cols*cellPx and rows*cellPx must equal the native image dimensions. The heavy image lives in Cloudinary (publicId); only this tiny config lives in git.
